profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Asia Pacific Fibers Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the textile business in Indonesia, Europe, the Americas, Asia, Africa, Australia, and the Middle East. It operates in two segments, Chemicals and Synthetic Fibre; and Weaving and Knitting. The company offers optical bright, open end, dope dyed black, high tenacity, non-woven, filling, spunlace, geotextile, hygiene, classic, antimicrobial, and antimony free polyester fibers, as well as polyester chips. It also provides partially oriented, spin draw, draw textured, and differential shrinkage yarns; and performance fabrics. In addition, the company is involved in textile trading and processing; and financial services. It exports its products. The company was formerly known as PT Polysindo Eka Perkasa Tbk and changed its name to PT Asia Pacific Fibers Tbk in December 2009. PT Asia Pacific Fibers Tbk was incorporated in 1984 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. The company operates as a subsidiary of Damiano Investments B.V.
profil.berita_terkini: ⚠️ Laporan keuangan dalam USD, harga dalam IDR. Rasio (ROE/ROA/margin) tetap valid, tetapi valuasi per-saham (EPS/PER/PBV/DCF) tidak akurat tanpa konversi kurs.
